text: I find myself at the threshold of a modern exhibition space, marked by clean lines, glass, and thoughtful displays. Entering this environment, I am struck by its intentional design—each detail seems to invite curiosity. As I approach the vibrant wall inside labeled 'R + D,' I feel drawn into the spirit of research and innovation. There is an inviting quality here, a sense that the unknown is not something to fear, but to explore. The words about darkness and contemplation resonate with me—I sense both the unease and the thrill of encountering new ideas. In this space, I feel reflective, eager to listen and learn, yet also slightly on edge from the intensity of innovation buzzing around me. The tension between possibility and uncertainty feels almost electric.
